title: Virginia passes redistricting measure that could help Democrats retake the House
description: The referendum creates as many as four Democratic-leaning districts in Virginia ahead of the midterm elections.

title: 5th Circuit allows Texas to require Ten Commandments in classrooms
description: The ruling sets up a likely Supreme Court battle over whether the Texas law violates the constitutional separation of church and state.

title: Chaos, a blast, then bloodshed: U.S. Marine recounts deadly Kabul airport attack
description: Survivors testified at the trial of a man charged in the 2021 suicide bombing at the Kabul airport that killed 13 U.S. troops and nearly 170 Afghans.

title: DOJ charges Southern Poverty Law Center over paid informants
description: The civil rights group is being investigated over how it has sought to infiltrate extremist groups, its CEO says, adding that it “will not be intimidated.”

title: Pentagon details record $1.5 trillion budget request
description: The nearly 50 percent jump in spending would fund many of President Donald Trump’s new military projects, but the request has to get through a skeptical Congress.

title: Trump fought to keep the ballroom fundraising contract secret. Here’s what’s in it.
description: The agreement governing hundreds of millions in private donations was kept secret until a watchdog group sued and a judge ordered it disclosed.

title: U.S. operations against Iran expand to Indian Ocean with tanker capture
description: The capture of the tanker ship Tifani follows a Trump administration directive to interdict sanctioned vessels believed to be involved in smuggling Iranian oil.

title: Virginia voters OK a Democratic effort to redraw the state's congressional map
description: Virginia voters have delivered a significant win to Democrats, as the party aims to pick up four more U.S. House seats in the state.

title: House Democrat resigns ahead of possible expulsion vote over alleged financial crimes
description: Rep. Sheila Cherfilus-McCormick was indicted last year on charges that she stole and laundered federal disaster money and used it to support a congressional campaign.

title: Southern Poverty Law Center indicted on federal fraud charges
description: The Justice Department alleges that the SPLC improperly raised millions of dollars to pay informants to infiltrate the Ku Klux Klan and other extremist groups.

title: DOJ’s vast conspiracy investigation into Trump foes picks up steam
description: In recent days, the Justice Department has summoned former intelligence officials under Barack Obama for interviews and made major shake-ups in its prosecutorial team.

title: GOP strategists required to sign NDAs at meeting on midterm plans
description: The unusual secrecy surrounding the Waldorf Astoria meeting has frustrated some looking for funding clues as Trump’s popularity has dropped to near historic lows.

title: What the sudden turnover in Trump's Cabinet means for him politically
description: With the news that Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer would be leaving her post later this year, President Trump has lost three high-profile women on his Cabinet in a little over a month.

title: An unusual number of Congress members are being pressured to resign or face expulsion
description: Rep. Sheila Cherfilus-McCormick, D-Fla., is one of four House members who have been under pressure to resign or face expulsion recently. What does this spate of embattled members say about Congress?

title: Florida AG launches criminal investigation into ChatGPT over FSU shooting
description: Florida's attorney general is launching a criminal investigation into the alleged role of ChatGPT in a mass shooting at Florida State University last year.

title: Florida Democrat Rep. Sheila Cherfilus-McCormick, facing possible expulsion, resigns
description: The Florida Democrat faced a potential expulsion vote in the House as she prepares for a federal trial on allegations that she stole disaster funds and used some of the money to finance her campaign.

title: Ex-staffers defend California governor hopeful after viral clips raise conduct questions
description: After Eric Swalwell’s exit, a letter from 30 ex-staffers of former representative Katie Porter seeks to blunt attacks as Democrats fear getting locked out of the race.

title: Democrats aim for midterm upsets in districts that Trump safely won
description: Strategists in both parties say the president’s unpopularity is dragging down incumbents not used to running hard campaigns, and some have been hit by scandals.

title: Trump extends U.S. ceasefire with Iran at Pakistan's request
description: The extension was announced just hours before it was set to expire. The president did not provide details on how long the new ceasefire extension will last.

title: Virginians head to polls to vote on measure to counter Trump's gerrymandering push
description: Voting ends Tuesday in Virginia, where a special ballot measure about redistricting could play a key role in determining which party wins the U.S. House this fall.

title: The hidden power keeping wages low
description: For decades, economists gave short shrift to the idea of monopsony — a power employers can have to suppress wages. Now a wave of research suggests it's everywhere, and a new book argues it's key to understanding today's inequality.

title: Here are the results for Virginia's 2026 redistricting ballot measure
description: Live election results: Get the latest on Virginia's special election on redistricting.

title: Trump’s statements on Iran increasingly contradict each other
description: The president has made conflicting comments on questions both large and small related to the war.

title: House Ethics panel makes rare request for information on sexual misconduct
description: The rare move comes after recent scandals raised questions from lawmakers and others about how Congress handles investigations involving its members.

title: ActBlue, Democratic fundraising engine, faces lawsuit over foreign donations
description: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton (R) alleged in the lawsuit that ActBlue misled Congress and the public about its donor vetting process.

title: Democrat in key race defended guns after mass shooting and insulted Kaepernick
description: Bob Brooks, a firefighter who appeals to the White working class, engaged with right-wing content. His endorsers in the Pennsylvania House race stand by him.

title: What a candidate’s old Facebook posts tell us about this moment for Democrats
description: The Washington Post’s essential guide to power and influence in D.C.

title: Uncertainty reigns at DOJ in the aftermath of Bondi’s departure
description: Acting attorney general Todd Blanche has moved quickly to put his stamp on the department, but other Trump loyalists also appear to be vying for leading roles.

title: Supreme Court justices turn children’s books into big paydays
description: The trend is fueled by their status as political celebrities in a deeply divided country.
